Package com.pallycon.widevinelibrary

Class PallyConMpegDashInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyConMpegDashInfo
  • public class PallyConMpegDashInfo
extends java.lang.Object
    Informs the MPEG-DASH Content file size. It informs the size of each resolution, bit rate, audio and subtitle.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      PallyConMpegDashInfo​(android.content.Context context, android.net.Uri mpdUri)
      constructor of MpdTrackSelector

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void extractPallyConMPDSizeInfo()
      Extracts content size information from MPEG-DASH manifest files.
      java.lang.String getAllTrackInfo()
      Returns size information for all tracks in an MPD file.
      java.lang.String getAudioLanguageSize()
      Returns the size for each language in the audio track.
      java.lang.String getMPDPallyConMeta()
      PallyCon Size Info Meta.
      java.lang.String getSubtitleLanguageSize()
      Returns the size for each language in the text track.
      java.lang.String getVideoBitrateSize()
      Returns the size by bitrate in the video track.
      java.lang.String getVideoResolutionSize()
      Returns the size by resolution in the video track.

    • Method Detail

      • extractPallyConMPDSizeInfo

        public void extractPallyConMPDSizeInfo()
                                throws PallyconDrmException
        Extracts content size information from MPEG-DASH manifest files.
        Throws:
        PallyconDrmException - PallyconDrmException

      • getAllTrackInfo

        public java.lang.String getAllTrackInfo()
        Returns size information for all tracks in an MPD file.
        Returns:
        All track information or null value is returned.

      • getVideoResolutionSize

        public java.lang.String getVideoResolutionSize()
        Returns the size by resolution in the video track.
        Returns:
        Returns the video size by resolution or null.

      • getVideoBitrateSize

        public java.lang.String getVideoBitrateSize()
        Returns the size by bitrate in the video track.
        Returns:
        Returns the video size per bitrate or null.

      • getAudioLanguageSize

        public java.lang.String getAudioLanguageSize()
        Returns the size for each language in the audio track.
        Returns:
        For each language, return the audio size or null.

      • getSubtitleLanguageSize

        public java.lang.String getSubtitleLanguageSize()
        Returns the size for each language in the text track.
        Returns:
        Return subtitle size for each language or null.

      • getMPDPallyConMeta

        public java.lang.String getMPDPallyConMeta()
        PallyCon Size Info Meta.
        Returns:
        Return Meta Informatrion or null.
